sections.title: Pulling the Mage Arena lever before starting Mage Arena I

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You're not allowed in there. Come downstairs if you want to enter my arena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What is this place?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Do not waste my time with trivial questions. I am the Great Kolodion, master of battle magic. I have an arena to run.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I enter?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Hah! A wizard of your level? Don't be absurd.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What is this place?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: I am the great Kolodion, master of battle magic, and this is my battle arena. Top wizards travel from all over Gielinor to fight here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I fight here?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: My arena is open to any high level wizard, but this is no game. Many wizards fall in this arena, never to rise again. The strongest mages have been destroyed.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: If you're sure you want in?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes indeedy.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Good, good. You have a healthy sense of competition.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Remember, traveller - in my arena, hand-to-hand combat is useless. Your strength will diminish as you enter the arena, but the spells you can learn are amongst the most powerful in all of Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Before I can accept you in, we must duel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, let's fight.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: I must first check that you are up to scratch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't need to worry about that.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Not just any magician can enter - only the most powerful and most feared. Before you can use the power of this arena, you must prove yourself against me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I don't.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Your loss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the point of that?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: We learn how to use our magic to its fullest and how to channel the forces of the cosmos into our world...

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: But mainly, I just like blasting people into dust.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's barbaric!

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Nope, it's magic. But I know what you mean. So do you want to join us?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You must prove yourself... now!

lines.speaker: Kolodion (Ogre)
lines.text: This is only the beginning; you can't beat me!

lines.speaker: Kolodion (Spider)
lines.text: Foolish mortal; I am unstoppable.

lines.speaker: Kolodion (Ghost)
lines.text: Now you feel it... The dark energy.

lines.speaker: Kolodion (Black demon)
lines.text: Aaaaaaaarrgghhhh! The power!

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Well done, young adventurer; you truly are a worthy battle mage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What now?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Step into the magic pool. It will take you to a chamber. There, you must decide which god you will represent in the arena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Kolodion.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: That's what I'm here for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Kolodion.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Hello, young mage. You're a tough one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello my friend, Kolodion sent me down.

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Sssshhh... the gods are talking. I can hear their whispers.

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Can you hear them adventurer, they're calling you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm... ok!

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Go chant at the statue of the god you most wish to represent in this world, you will be rewarded.

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Once you are done, come back to me. I shall supply you with a mage staff ready for battle.

sections.title: Talking to the chamber guardian after choosing a cape

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Hello adventurer, have you made your choice?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have.

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Good, good, I hope you have chosen well. Have you been rewarded with a cape from your chosen god?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't have it with me.

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Once you have your cape come back to me, and I shall supply you with a mage staff ready for battle.

lines.speaker: Chamber guardian
lines.text: Good, good, I hope you have chosen well. I will now present you with a magic staff. This, along with the cape awarded to you by your chosen god, are all the weapons and armour you will need here.

sections.title: Talking to Kolodion after choosing a god

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Kolodion.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Hey there, how are you? Are you enjoying the bloodshed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've had enough for now.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: A shame. You're a good battle mage. I hope to see you soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I use my new spells outside of the arena?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Experience, my friend, experience. Once you've used the spell enough times in the arena, you'll be able to use them in the rest of Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good stuff.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: Not so good for the citizens; they won't stand a chance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How am I doing so far?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You still need to train with the strike spell inside the arena before you can use it outside.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You have completed over half of the training needed to use the strike spell outside of the arena.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You are almost ready to use the strike spell outside of the arena.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You're experienced enough to use the strike spell anywhere.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You still need to train with the claw spell inside the arena before you can use it outside.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You have completed over half of the training needed to use the claw spell outside of the arena.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You are almost ready to use the claw spell outside of the arena.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You're experienced enough to use the claw spell anywhere.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You still need to train with the flame spell inside the arena before you can use it outside.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You have completed over half of the training needed to use the flame spell outside of the arena.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You are almost ready to use the flame spell outside of the arena.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You're experienced enough to use the flame spell anywhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are there any more challenges available?

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You still need to learn how to cast all god spells outside of the arena.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: I've made a note of the spells you still need to learn in your journal.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: You have indeed shown potential, [player name].

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: However, a wizard of your level wouldn't stand a chance.

lines.speaker: Kolodion
lines.text: I am one of the most powerful mages in existence. But even my power has limitations. There are some beings however that have power exceeding even my own.
